channel.title: ubuntu on I'm Mauricio Alpuin
channel.description: Recent content in ubuntu on I'm Mauricio Alpuin

item.title: Pi-Hole - DNS and AdBlocker
item.description: This application was the first one that I wanted to try when I installed and configured my personal server. As I wrote in my last post, I’ve installed and configured a personal server at home to run some applications for my personal use, so my next step was this really popular application pi-hole. pi-hole is an opensource and free software that offers a DNS, DHCP and an incredible Ad-blocker (it has other additional functions but the ones that I mention are the core).

item.title: My Home Server
item.description: I finally decided to buy a mini pc to start playing with some basics things that we don’t really need but that are really helpful when you are surfing the web from home. The main reason for doing that was because I’m thinking to move my personal blog to my own hosting, MY HOME SERVER. Technology/Software that I have used: Mini Pc Ubuntu Server 22.04 Microk8s Metallb Heimdall Application Dashboard Here is a diagram of how my home server network and components are working right now.
